author.name: Alex Rivera
author.bio: Full-stack engineer & designer crafting high-performance web experiences. Passionate about animation, 3D, and developer tooling.

about.headline: I build things for the web that feel alive.
about.bio:
Hey! I'm Alex — a full-stack developer and UI engineer with 6+ years of experience building products at scale. I specialise in React/Next.js, animation-first interfaces, and performant backend systems.

I've worked on products used by millions. I obsess over pixel-perfect design, silky-smooth 60fps animations, and rock-solid code quality. When I'm not coding, you'll find me tinkering with 3D art or hiking mountain trails.

projects.title: Aurora Design System
projects.blurb: A fully accessible, themeable React component library built for design at scale.
projects.description: Aurora is a production-grade design system used across a suite of SaaS products. It ships 80+ components with dark/light mode, full keyboard navigation, and comprehensive Storybook documentation. Built with React, TypeScript, Radix UI primitives, and Tailwind CSS.

projects.title: Nebula Analytics
projects.blurb: Real-time analytics dashboard with 3D data visualizations and AI-powered insights.
projects.description: Nebula processes 10M+ events/day and surfaces them through an interactive Three.js dashboard. The backend is a real-time pipeline built on Kafka, Spark, and PostgreSQL. The frontend uses React Query for live updates and D3.js for custom charts.

projects.title: InkFlow CMS
projects.blurb: A headless CMS with a drag-and-drop page builder and markdown-first authoring.
projects.description: InkFlow is a developer-friendly headless CMS featuring a visual drag-and-drop builder, real-time collaboration, and a GraphQL API. It powers 200+ websites and handles 50K+ content updates monthly.

projects.title: Waveform Music App
projects.blurb: An immersive music streaming interface with WebGL waveform visualizations.
projects.description: Waveform reimagines music playback with real-time WebGL audio visualizations powered by the Web Audio API and Three.js. Features include playlist management, cross-fade transitions, and an AI recommendation engine.

projects.title: Orbit SaaS Platform
projects.blurb: Multi-tenant SaaS boilerplate with billing, RBAC, and a killer dashboard.
projects.description: Orbit is a production-ready SaaS starter with Stripe billing, multi-tenant architecture, role-based access control, and a fully animated dashboard. Ships with a Next.js frontend, Prisma ORM, and Docker Compose for local development.

projects.title: Solstice 3D Portfolio
projects.blurb: An experimental immersive 3D portfolio experience built entirely with Three.js.
projects.description: Solstice is a fully 3D portfolio experience where projects are showcased as floating objects in a stylised 3D world. Users navigate by scrolling through scenes powered by GSAP ScrollTrigger and Three.js camera animations.
